entity.label: Susanna

entity.description: Lily, with other pious women, ministered to Jesus (Luke 8:3).

nodes.label: Susanna
nodes.description: Lily, with other pious women, ministered to Jesus (Luke 8:3).

verses.text: And Joanna the wife of Chuza Herod’s steward, and Susanna, and many others, which ministered unto him of their substance.
